calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-27-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Judgment Debtor LESA L LEWIS (AKA LESA LAVETTA LEWIS AKA LESA L HALLEWIS), Tel No. (415) 672-6770 present in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Judgment Debtor Ms. Lewis did not provide notice to opposing side of her intent to appear today. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judgment Debtor Lesa L. Lewis (aka Lesa Lavetta Lewis aka Lesa L Hallewis)'s Claim of Exemption is denied. COURT SHALL SIGN AND MAIL OUT A FORMAL ORDER. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
